summary: A direct 4-2-3-1 built to free Akram Afif and break in transition from a mid-block — but with real defensive worries.
style: 4-2-3-1 — direct (most long balls per 90), rotations to free Akram Afif, sitting in a mid-block to create counters.

counterReliance.note: Mid-block to create counters, most long balls per 90

strengths: Most long balls per 90 — a direct, vertical threat
Clever rotations to free Akram Afif (11 assists)
weaknesses: Defensive worries — -7 goal difference in qualifying

keyPlayers.name: Akram Afif
keyPlayers.note: Pacey, skilful dribbler with composure around goal and a creative final pass

tactics: Drop into a mid-block, go direct, and use rotations to spring Afif on the counter. The creative upside is exciting; the defensive numbers are the concern.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
